# WM8 Washer Manual

## E21 Drain Fault
Error code E21 means the washer cannot drain. Pause the cycle, clean the pump filter, straighten the drain hose, then run spin only to confirm water leaves the drum.

## Drum Clean Maintenance
Run drum clean every month with the washer empty. Wipe the door gasket and detergent drawer so odor and lint do not return.

## 洗衣机震动
如果 washer vibration is severe, remove transit bolts, level all four feet, and split heavy towels into a balanced load.
